pi_items.source: Parsed 'CRF' sheet of sample_crf.xls which explicitly lists CRF_NAME* as 'Vital Signs'.
Parsed 'Items' sheet of sample_crf.xls which contains exactly 7 items (systolic_bp, diastolic_bp, heart_rate, temperature, resp_rate, weight, height), satisfying the minimum of 5.
setup_task.sh explicitly copies /workspace/data/sample_crf.xls to this destination.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the provided sample_crf.xls is a synthetic OpenClinica template containing exactly 7 items (systolic_bp, diastolic_bp, heart_rate, temperature, resp_rate, weight, height) and explicitly specifying the CRF_NAME* as 'Vital Signs'. The setup script guarantees it is copied to the expected path /home/ga/sample_crf.xls.
